customManagers.description: Update Plugin(...) dependency versions in BuildXmlFiles.groovy

packageRules.description: Regenerate SpotBugs profile XMLs, update README metadata and FindbugsRulesDefinition.RULE_COUNT after SpotBugs update

commands: TOTAL_BUGS=$(cd generate_profiles && groovy BuildXmlFiles.groovy | awk '/Total bugs patterns/{print $4}' | tail -1); export TOTAL_BUGS; node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const bugs=process.env.TOTAL_BUGS;if(!bugs)throw new Error("Total bugs patterns not found");const pom=fs.readFileSync("pom.xml","utf8");const spot=(pom.match(/<spotbugs.version>([^<]+)<\/spotbugs.version>/)||[])[1];if(!spot)throw new Error("spotbugs.version not found in pom.xml");const p="README.md";const lines=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8").split("\n");for(let i=0;i<lines.length;i++){if(lines[i].includes("SpotBugs_rules-")){lines[i]=lines[i].replace(/(SpotBugs_rules-)\d+(-brightgreen\.svg\?maxAge=2592000)/,`$1${bugs}$2`);break;}}let last=-1;for(let i=0;i<lines.length;i++){if(/^\s*[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+(?:-[^|\s]+)?\s*\|/.test(lines[i]))last=i;}if(last>=0){const cols=lines[last].split("|");if(cols.length>=2){cols[1]=` ${spot} (SpotBugs) `;lines[last]=cols.join("|");}}fs.writeFileSync(p,lines.join("\n"));'

node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const path=require("path");const dir="src/main/resources/org/sonar/plugins/findbugs";for(const name of fs.readdirSync(dir)){if(!name.endsWith(".xml"))continue;const p=path.join(dir,name);const content=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");fs.writeFileSync(p,content.replace(/\r?\n/g,"\r\n"),"utf8");}'

packageRules.description: Regenerate SpotBugs profile XMLs, update README metadata and FbContribRulesDefinition.RULE_COUNT after sb-contrib update

commands: TOTAL_BUGS=$(cd generate_profiles && groovy BuildXmlFiles.groovy | awk '/Total bugs patterns/{print $4}' | tail -1); export TOTAL_BUGS; node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const bugs=process.env.TOTAL_BUGS;if(!bugs)throw new Error("Total bugs patterns not found");const pom=fs.readFileSync("pom.xml","utf8");const sbcontrib=(pom.match(/<sbcontrib.version>([^<]+)<\/sbcontrib.version>/)||[])[1];if(!sbcontrib)throw new Error("sbcontrib.version not found in pom.xml");const p="README.md";const lines=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8").split("\n");let last=-1;for(let i=0;i<lines.length;i++){if(/^\s*[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+(?:-[^|\s]+)?\s*\|/.test(lines[i]))last=i;}if(last>=0){const cols=lines[last].split("|");if(cols.length>=5){cols[3]=` ${sbcontrib} (sb-contrib) `;lines[last]=cols.join("|");}}fs.writeFileSync(p,lines.join("\n"));'

node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const path=require("path");const dir="src/main/resources/org/sonar/plugins/findbugs";for(const name of fs.readdirSync(dir)){if(!name.endsWith(".xml"))continue;const p=path.join(dir,name);const content=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");fs.writeFileSync(p,content.replace(/\r?\n/g,"\r\n"),"utf8");}'

packageRules.description: Regenerate SpotBugs profile XMLs, update README metadata and FindSecurityBugs RULE_COUNTs after findsecbugs update

commands: TOTAL_BUGS=$(cd generate_profiles && groovy BuildXmlFiles.groovy | awk '/Total bugs patterns/{print $4}' | tail -1); export TOTAL_BUGS; node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const bugs=process.env.TOTAL_BUGS;if(!bugs)throw new Error("Total bugs patterns not found");const pom=fs.readFileSync("pom.xml","utf8");const fsb=(pom.match(/<findsecbugs.version>([^<]+)<\/findsecbugs.version>/)||[])[1];if(!fsb)throw new Error("findsecbugs.version not found in pom.xml");const p="README.md";const lines=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8").split("\n");let last=-1;for(let i=0;i<lines.length;i++){if(/^\s*[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+(?:-[^|\s]+)?\s*\|/.test(lines[i]))last=i;}if(last>=0){const cols=lines[last].split("|");if(cols.length>=4){cols[2]=` ${fsb} `;lines[last]=cols.join("|");}}fs.writeFileSync(p,lines.join("\n"));'

node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const path=require("path");const dir="src/main/resources/org/sonar/plugins/findbugs";for(const name of fs.readdirSync(dir)){if(!name.endsWith(".xml"))continue;const p=path.join(dir,name);const content=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");fs.writeFileSync(p,content.replace(/\r?\n/g,"\r\n"),"utf8");}'
